title: centriMembSolver: a finite-volume solver for rotating membrane systems built on OpenFOAM technology
description:
centriMembSolver is a finite-volume solver for transient, incompressible flow with solute and passive-tracer transport across selective membranes in a uniformly rotating frame. It is derived from OpenFOAM's buoyantBoussinesqPimpleFoam (v2506) and adds:

  • Explicit treatment of Coriolis and centrifugal forces in the momentum equation, with the centrifugal hydrostatic component absorbed into the modified pressure p_rgh via the gh field (classical rotating-Boussinesq construction);
  • A custom CAViscosity kinematic-viscosity model with a polynomial dependence on solute concentration;
  • Three custom membrane boundary conditions (membraneSolventFlux, membraneSoluteFlux, membraneTracerFlux), each offering three Spiegler--Kedem / Kedem--Katchalsky modeling choices (intrinsic rejection, solute permeability, observed rejection; constant flux, target average flux, etc.);
  • Built-in mass-conservation diagnostics and per-patch flux logging.

Compatible with OpenFOAM® v2506. Distributed under GPL-3.0-or-later. Documentation under CC-BY-4.0.

creators.name: Geraldes, Vítor
